name: MGE ENERGY INC
summary: MGE Energy, Inc. is a holding company whose principal subsidiary is Madison Gas and Electric Company (MGE), a regulated utility. MGE provides electric and natural gas services to customers in Wisconsin. MGE Energy also has nonregulated business operations. MGE represents the majority of MGE Energy's assets, liabilities, revenues, expenses, and operations.

products.name: Electric Service
products.description: Regulated electric utility service provided by Madison Gas and Electric Company in Wisconsin.

products.name: Natural Gas Service
products.description: Regulated natural gas utility service provided by Madison Gas and Electric Company in Wisconsin.

products.name: Nonregulated Business
products.description: Nonregulated business operations conducted by MGE Energy separate from its regulated utility subsidiary.
